title: Supply Chain Manager - Mahindra Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Mahindra Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Mahindra Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!
